title: Hello, Goodbye Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
"hello" on one switch 
"goodbye" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book Hello, Goodbye by David Lloyd

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of Hello, Goodbye. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "A big brown bear stepped up, (hello) he said very loudly"
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
